spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1178 Brief spoilers for onepiece chapter 1178 by me
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1178 Brief spoilers for onepiece chapter 1178 by me

spoilers.title: It's clear that Imu won't go all out. Because Oda will be saving his full arsenal for later. And it's the first time Imu will fight in his "true" form, someone who has ruled for over 800 years. No mat
spoilers.text: It's clear that Imu won't go all out. Because Oda will be saving his full arsenal for later. And it's the first time Imu will fight in his "true" form, someone who has ruled for over 800 years. No matter how you look at it, Oda definitely won't give Imu another L. It's going to be a clear-cut case, and it's going to end in disaster. Kilingham has already warned the others: don't underestimate them. Right now, it looks like the StrawHats that they won: - Imu/Gunko defeated - Kilingham/Sommers defeated - DR army defeated Everything points to a clear victory, but that will completely change when Imu appears. The end of Elbaph could play out like Sabody...

spoilers.title: [#ONEPIECE1178] So after seeing spoilers, it’s very possible Imu will appear in a quite different form, through Gunko like he did Saturn on God Valley. Though he might already be in the form he was in
spoilers.text: [#ONEPIECE1178] So after seeing spoilers, it’s very possible Imu will appear in a quite different form, through Gunko like he did Saturn on God Valley. Though he might already be in the form he was in when Domi reverse Rocks. It’s not working on Luffy & Loki, possible by him himself coming to Elbaph might actually start to work, gotta wait & see. Video

items.text: It's clear that Imu won't go all out. Because Oda will be saving his full arsenal for later. And it's the first time Imu will fight in his "true" form, someone who has ruled for over 800 years. No matter how you look at it, Oda definitely won't give Imu another L. It's going to be a clear-cut case, and it's going to end in disaster. Kilingham has already warned the others: don't underestimate them. Right now, it looks like the StrawHats that they won: - Imu/Gunko defeated - Kilingham/Sommers defeated - DR army defeated Everything points to a clear victory, but that will completely change when Imu appears. The end of Elbaph could play out like Sabody...
